title: fraxinus excelsior var. australis
intro: Fraxinus excelsior var. australis, also known as the Scottish ash, is a subspecies of the common ash tree native to the UK. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Fraxinus excelsior var. australis include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
